title: A Letter For You
paragraphs: Hey love,^1000 I wanted to write something you could come back to whenever you need a smile.
Meeting you made life feel warmer in ways I did not expect.
I love your laugh,^700 your kindness,^700 and the way you make even quiet moments feel full.
This little page is simple, but it carries a real feeling: I am grateful for you.
Thank you for being here.^1000 Thank you for being you.
